title: AntiCrystal-Anchor
description: AntiCrystal-Anchor is a Plugin that prevents Players to craft & use Crystals and Anchors.
body:
# AntiCrystal-Anchor

**A powerful protection plugin that prevents End Crystal and Respawn Anchor abuse on your server with granular control over crafting, placing, and usage.**

## Key Features

* **End Crystal Protection:** Block crafting, placing, and using End Crystals to prevent crystal PvP exploits.

![Craft Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3dda540efee0b4ff4e44c2e91a87f61c42de745.png)

![Placing Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/259dc118626b8d061215efd39b46cc1f7da872bf.png)

* **Respawn Anchor Protection:** Prevent Respawn Anchor bombs in the Overworld and End dimensions.

![Craft Anchors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1d5e15343e9d75f982f3fb40af0f664a666e1d0.png)

![Place Anchors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7488e3acbe7a41a06637a08154484db53f5716f7.png)

* **Granular Control:** Enable/disable each restriction independently for both items.
* **Inventory Scanning:** Periodic inventory checks with configurable actions (remove or notify).
* **Bypass Permissions:** Allow trusted players to bypass restrictions.
* **Multi-Language Support:** Fully translated in **English** and **German**.
* **Auto-Config Updates:** New config options are added automatically without losing your settings.

## Protection Options

| Item | Craft | Place | Use |
| :--- | :---: | :---: | :---: |
| End Crystal | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Respawn Anchor | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

## Commands & Permissions

| Role | Command | Permission |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Admin | `/anticrystal reload` | `anticrystalanchor.reload` |
| Admin | View notifications | `anticrystalanchor.notify` |
| Bypass | Bypass Crystal | `anticrystalanchor.bypass.crystal` |
| Bypass | Bypass Anchor | `anticrystalanchor.bypass.anchor` |
| Bypass | Bypass All | `anticrystalanchor.bypass.*` |

---

## Configuration Highlights

```yaml
# End Crystal Settings
end-crystal:
  enabled: true
  block-craft: true
  block-place: true
  block-use: true
  remove-on-place: true

# Respawn Anchor Settings  
respawn-anchor:
  enabled: true
  block-craft: true
  block-place: true
  block-use: true

# Inventory scanning
inventory-check:
  enabled: true
  interval: 60  # seconds
  action: "notify"  # "remove" or "notify"
```

---

### Why Use This Plugin?

🛡️ **Prevent Grief:** Stop crystal and anchor bombing on your server  
⚔️ **Fair PvP:** Disable overpowered crystal PvP mechanics  
🔒 **Full Control:** Granular settings for each item and action  
📢 **Admin Alerts:** Get notified when players attempt blocked actions

---

### Dependencies (optional)

**We recommend installing LuckPerms** for a better permission management experience!

### Compatibility

✅ **Paper** 1.21.x  
✅ **Folia** 1.21.x  
✅ **Spigot** 1.21.x

### Support

For bugs or support: https://discord.gg/Mkgz7YK7Y8
